fields.name: targetId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the target of the signature.

fields.name: targetType
fields.description: Specifies the type of target associated with the signature.

fields.name: signerName
fields.description: The name of the person providing the signature.

fields.name: signatureDataUrl
fields.description: Encoded signature image data, typically a data URL.
fields.synonyms: signature image, image data, signature representation

fields.name: signedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the signature was captured.

fields.name: ipAddress
fields.description: The client's IP address during signature capture.
fields.synonyms: client IP, source IP, originating IP

overridableConfigKeys.default: Use your finger or stylus to sign below
overridableConfigKeys.label: Instructions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Helper text shown to the signer above the pad

overridableConfigKeys.label: Pad title
overridableConfigKeys.description: Heading shown above the signature pad
